scripts.build: vite build && node sync-public-assets.mjs && node inline-scripts.mjs
scripts.check:syntax: node --check public/assets/js/auth-state-runtime.js && node --check public/assets/js/workspace-state-runtime.js && node --check public/assets/js/exam-state-runtime.js && node --check public/assets/js/school-state-runtime.js && node --check public/assets/js/app.js && node --check public/assets/js/cloud.js && node --check public/assets/js/cloud-workspace-runtime.js && node --check public/assets/js/mobile-manager.js
scripts.validate: npm run check:syntax && npm run test:auth-state && npm run test:workspace-state && npm run test:exam-state && npm run test:school-state && npm run test:runtime-order && npm run build
scripts.sync: npm run build && npm run push
